titleStmt.title: SII 26.430: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 430. (A.R. No. 409 of 1909.) SIDDHALIṄGAMAḌAM, TIRUKKOYILUR TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: East wall of the same prākāra.

p.hi: Tribhº Rājarājadēva II: Year 7, Tulā (Aippaśi) 3 = 1153 A.D. September 29, Tuesday.

summary.p: This inscription contains the praśasti of the king commencing with Pūmaruviya tirumādum Puvimādum, etc., and mentions the queen Ulaguḍai Mukkōkkiḻāṉaḍigaḷ.

It records a gift of land for the purpose of raising a flower-garden to provide for flower garlands to the god Tiruppulippagavadēvar of Śiṟṟingūr, a brahmadēyam in Kuṟukkaik-kūṟṟam in Malāḍu in Rājarāja-vaḷanāḍu, by Maṇalūruḍaiyāṉ Tiruvagattipaḻippili, the madhyasthaṉ of Maṇalūr alias Kalyāṇamahādēvichchaturvēdimaṅgalam, a brahmadēyam, in Śeṅguṉṟanāḍu of Vāṇagōppāḍi on the northern bank of the Peṇṇai river, in Rājarājā-vaḷanāḍu. The land is stated to have belonged to the donor who had purchased it from Bhāradvāji Āṇḍapiḷḷai Tiruppulippagavar and others.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pūmaruviya tirumātum puvimātum jeyamātum nāmaruviya kalaimātum pukaḻmātu
nayantu pulka Arumaṟai viti neṟi taḻaippa varumuṟai Urimai maṇimuṭi cūṭit tiṅkaḷ veṇkuṭait ticai
kkaḷiṟeṭṭun taṅku taṉik kūṭattāṉeṉ viḷaṅkak karuṅkalippaṭṭiyai ceṅkol turappa poru ka
tirāḻi puvi vaḷarntuṭaṉ varavillavari Īṭṭar miṉavar ciṅkaḷar pallavar nutaliyar pāttivar paṇiya Eṇṇaruṅ kaṟpaka maṇ
ṇakam puṇarntu cempoṉ virasiṁhāsaṉattu Ulakuṭaimukkokkiḻāṉaṭiḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kopparake
caripanmarāṉa tripuvaṉaccakkaravarttikaḷ śrīrājarājadevarkku yāṇṭu Eḻāvatu tulānāyaṟṟut tiyati muṉṟiṉāl rājarājavaḷanāṭ
ṭup peṇṉey vaṭakaraiy vāṇakoppāṭic ceṅkuṉṟa nāṭṭu brahmadeyam maṇalūrāṉa kalyāṇamahādeviccaturvvedimaṅkalattu
maddhyasthaṉ maṇalūruṭaiyāṉ tiruvakatti paḻippiliyeṉ Iṉnāṭṭu malāṭṭuk kuṟukkaikkūṟṟattu bmahradeyañ ciṟṟiṅkūr Uṭaiyār tiruppuli
ppakavadevaṟkku tiruppaḷḷittāmañ cātti Aruḷukaikku nāṉ tirunandavaṉamāka ceytuviṭṭa nilamāvatu Ivvūr bhāradvāji Āṇṭapiḷḷai tiruppu
lippakavar Uḷḷiṭṭār pakkal ṉāṉ vilaikoṇṭuṭaiyeṉāy Eṉṉutāy Irun=ta nilam vaṭavaḻi Eṉṟu perkūvappaṭṭa nilattil nāṉ tiruṉandavaṉamāha
cceytuviṭṭaWritten below.nilattukkuk kiḻpāṟkkellai ciṟṟiṅkūruṭaiyān comaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ vilaikoṇṭuṭaiya ṉilattukku meṟkkum teṉpāṟkkellai Ippaḻi
ppili nilattukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkkellai Idevar tevatāṉam vaṭavaḻi toṇṭikkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkkellai Ātreyaṉ tiruvaṇṇāmalaiyu
ṭaiyāṉ Uyyavantāṉ bhaṭṭaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭār Aracettak kollaikku teṟkum Āka Ivvicain=ta nāṟperelḷaiyuḷ Ākappaṭṭa nilam patinaṟucāṇ kolāl kuḻi nūṟum Iṉṉilattil U
ḷpaṭṭa meṉokkiṉa maramuṅ kiḻnokkiṉa kiṇaṟum Akappaṭa tiruppaḷḷittāmañ cāttiyaruḷukaikkut tirunandavaṉamāka candrādityavaṟ celvatākac ceytuWritten below.viṭṭeṉ Immaṇalūrruṭai
yāṉ tiruvakattipaḻippiliyeṉ Itu panmāheśvararakṣai .§
Digital edition of SII 26.430 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
